name: Web Scraper Agent
description: Scrape any web page as clean Markdown using your Chrome browser. Requires Chrome with Frevana extension installed. Auto-installs frevana-cli on first use.
prompts: Scrape https://news.ycombinator.com and summarize the top 10 stories with links.
Scrape this URL and extract the main article content as clean Markdown.

skills.name: frevana
skills.description: Control Chrome browser to scrape web pages as Markdown, ask AI platforms questions, and publish to social media. Uses your logged-in browser sessions. Requires Chrome with Frevana extension: download from https://static.frevana.com/app-updates/extension/frevana-extension.zip
